message:
feat(notion): add database and block CRUD operations

Expand Notion connector with 6 new operations:

Database: get_database, create_database (with parent/title/properties
validation), update_database (patch title/properties/description)
Block: get_block, update_block, delete_block (archive via archived:true)

All operations include FCP method dispatch routing, typed invoke
handlers, and proper error mapping through FcpError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
